title: Discovery Call
content_plaintext: Had a great initial call with Jane from Acme. They are evaluating us for their sales team.

title: Follow Up
content_plaintext: Sent over the proposal. Waiting on sign-off from their CFO.

title: Intro Call
content_plaintext: Jane is the main champion. Very engaged and asked good questions about integrations.

title: Deal Update
content_plaintext: Moving to contract stage. Legal review expected to take 2 weeks.

title: Technical Review
content_plaintext: John wants a deep-dive on the API. Scheduling with engineering.
